case_title: TARGET NATIONAL BANK VS. ALEKSANDR LABUNSKIY et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LABUNSKIY, ALEKSANDR DOES 1 TO 15 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-06-2010

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LABUNSKIY, ALEKSANDR $1,923.51 PRINCIPAL, $267.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,191.01, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-19-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK SERVED JUL-01-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LABUNSKIY, ALEKSANDR

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 15 INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $267.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LABUNSKIY, ALEKSANDR

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-26-2011 CONTINUED TO DEC-19-2011 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE OCT-26-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
